test_cases.brief_summary: Greenfield Foods undeclared allergen recall — mid-sized food manufacturer, FSA-notified voluntary recall, full 7-step pipeline with proactive media outreach and press release — existing example
test_cases.editorial_naturalness_note: Two minor tells — one stock crisis phrase and one boilerplate internal-memo close; otherwise the package inhabits each document's genre conventions with precision, particularly the spokesperson landmines which read as operational comms advice rather than template output.

test_cases.brief_summary: NovaPay fintech data breach — 12,000 customer records accessed, ICO notified, CEO as spokesperson, no proactive media outreach (minimize attention), press release warranted — simulated deliverable
test_cases.editorial_naturalness_note: One mildly aphoristic line in the FAQ ('Trust is rebuilt through actions'); otherwise the data-breach register is inhabited correctly, with the spokesperson landmines standing out as genuine communications craft.

test_cases.brief_summary: Westgate University research fraud allegations — professor accused by former PhD students on social media, internal investigation underway, Vice-Chancellor as spokesperson, proactive media outreach, no press release — simulated deliverable
test_cases.editorial_naturalness_note: Two stock institutional phrases ('committed to maintaining the highest standards,' 'we take all concerns seriously') that are genre conventions but also AI defaults; the internal memo's pre-emptive defense of the 'cannot comment' constraint is the strongest piece of editorial craft.
